mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_action_log( logno, memberno, dogno, chatno, action_type, input_data, output_data, ai_model, success_yn, error_message, response_time, token_usage, rdate ) VALUES( ai_action_log_seq.nextval,
#{memberno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dogno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{chatno, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{actionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inputData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{outputData, jdbcType=CLOB},
#{aiModel, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{successYn, jdbcType=CHAR},
#{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{responseTime},
#{tokenUsage},
sysdate )
mapper.select:
SELECT logno, memberno, dogno, chatno,
action_type AS actionType,
input_data AS inputData, output_data AS outputData,
ai_model AS aiModel,
success_yn AS successYn,
error_message AS errorMessage,
response_time AS responseTime,
token_usage AS tokenUsage,
rdate
FROM ai_action_log
WHERE logno = #{logno}

SELECT logno, memberno, dogno, chatno,
action_type AS actionType,
input_data AS inputData, output_data AS outputData,
ai_model AS aiModel,
success_yn AS successYn,
error_message AS errorMessage,
response_time AS responseTime,
token_usage AS tokenUsage,
rdate
FROM ai_action_log
ORDER BY logno DESC

SELECT logno, memberno, dogno, chatno,
action_type AS actionType,
input_data AS inputData, output_data AS outputData,
ai_model AS aiModel,
success_yn AS successYn,
error_message AS errorMessage,
response_time AS responseTime,
token_usage AS tokenUsage,
rdate
FROM ai_action_log
WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
ORDER BY logno DESC

SELECT logno, memberno, dogno, chatno,
action_type AS actionType,
input_data AS inputData, output_data AS outputData,
ai_model AS aiModel,
success_yn AS successYn,
error_message AS errorMessage,
response_time AS responseTime,
token_usage AS tokenUsage,
rdate
FROM ai_action_log
WHERE action_type = #{actionType}
ORDER BY logno DESC
